title: Zoro Searches for the Breath
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on zoro searches for the breath, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Zoro Searches for the Breath. Zoro fights Mr. 1 and begins confronting the challenge of cutting steel itself. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 1
dialogue.text: Crap! I can't keep up with these attacks! I have to go on the offensive!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 1
dialogue.text: I have to risk an all or nothing gamble!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 1
dialogue.text: I have to find a way to beat him in just 3 minutes!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Now's not the time for you to be worrying about others...

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 1
dialogue.text: If she keeps digging at this speed into the ruins,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I hope you split your head!

summary: This part develops zoro searches for the breath and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
